subcodes.first_line: O dear daughter! Thy letter hath arrived; it was a demonstration of thy firmness and steadfastness in this peerless Cause… In the Bolshevistic principles equality is effected through force.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز نامه ات رسید برهان ثبوت و استقامت بر امر بدیع بود
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
